# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent sqs policy too permissive.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the environment
    Default: dev

Resources:
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-queue"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref QueueEncryptionKey
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-dlq"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref QueueEncryptionKey

  EventProcessingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-topic"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref TopicEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  QueueEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS to encrypt
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS to encrypt
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  TopicEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS to encrypt
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.Arn
          - Sid: AllowSQSAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sqs:RequestAlias: !Ref EventProcessingQueue

  TopicSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: SQS Queue URL
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-queue-url"

  TopicArn:
    Description: SNS Topic ARN
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-topic-arn"
